subject: A Sphinx — large winged humanoid with a bearded elder's face, seated on a rocky outcrop overlooking clouds, wings spread wide
description: A massive Sphinx sits perched on a rocky outcrop with broad wings fully spread to either side. The wings are layered in deep red, purple, and orange feathers, and embedded within the wing surfaces are points of blue light suggesting a starfield or cosmic element. The figure's upper body is humanoid: an elder with a prominent beard and long hair, wearing a blue sleeveless garment. A bead and talisman necklace hangs across the chest. The face is turned upward and to one side, gazing skyward with apparent contemplation. The background is an expansive sky with pale blue-grey clouds catching diffuse warm light on the horizon.
foreground: Sphinx seated on rocky outcrop, wings spread, bearded humanoid face, bead necklace
background: sky, pale blue-grey clouds, warm horizon light
